body.purpose: Explanations, safety copy, and form guidance.

shadows.name: cover-lift
shadows.purpose: The generated cover inside the transformation stage only.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Controls, menu transitions, and media reveals.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus-adjacent, and button state feedback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The dominant action for signup, progression, and selected intent.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 22px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--color-signal, oklch(0.86 0.19 122)); color: oklch(0.15 0.02 240); font: 760 1rem/1.2 'Inclusive Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background-color 180ms ease; } .ds-button-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.9 0.2 122); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-button-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-signal, oklch(0.86 0.19 122)); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A clear alternative action without competing with the signal color.
components.css: .ds-button-secondary { min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 22px; border: 1px solid var(--color-ink, oklch(0.155 0.02 240)); border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.155 0.02 240)); font: 760 1rem/1.2 'Inclusive Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background-color 180ms ease; } .ds-button-secondary:hover { background: var(--color-surface, oklch(0.965 0.012 230)); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-button-secondary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-button-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-signal, oklch(0.86 0.19 122)); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Email Field
components.description: Plain, high-contrast signup input with an explicit visible label.
components.html: <label class="ds-field-label" for="ds-email">Email address</label><input class="ds-field" id="ds-email" type="email" placeholder="you@example.com">
components.css: .ds-field-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 10px; color: inherit; font: 760 0.94rem/1.2 'Inclusive Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field { width: 100%; min-height: 52px; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.82 0.028 230); border-radius: 10px; background: oklch(0.99 0.006 230); color: oklch(0.15 0.02 240); font: 400 1rem/1.5 'Inclusive Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-signal, oklch(0.86 0.19 122)); outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-field[aria-invalid='true'] { border-color: var(--color-danger, oklch(0.56 0.19 28)); }

components.name: Header Navigation
components.description: A restrained fixed header that lets the hero carry the visual weight.
components.html: How it worksYour soundSafety
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 32px; min-height: 64px; padding: 0 20px; background: var(--color-bg, oklch(1 0 0)); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-line, oklch(0.865 0.018 230)); } .ds-nav a { color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.455 0.03 235)); font: 650 0.92rem/1.2 'Inclusive Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: color 180ms ease; } .ds-nav a:hover { color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.155 0.02 240)); } .ds-nav a:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-signal, oklch(0.86 0.19 122)); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Study Track Stamp
components.description: A compact proof-of-output label laid directly over student photography.
components.html: Study trackCell Structure03:18
components.css: .ds-track-stamp { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto; align-items: center; width: min(100%, 410px); gap: 14px; padding: 14px 18px; border-radius: 10px; background: var(--color-signal, oklch(0.86 0.19 122)); color: oklch(0.15 0.02 240); font-family: 'Inclusive Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-track-stamp svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; } .ds-track-stamp span { display: grid; font-size: 0.78rem; } .ds-track-stamp strong { font-size: 0.95rem; } .ds-track-stamp small { font-size: 0.78rem; }

components.name: Genre Cover
components.description: A flat, collectible music object with subject context and no decorative card chrome.
components.html:
Cell Biology

Afrobeats

Momentum for a topic that needs repeat plays.
components.css: .ds-genre { max-width: 420px; color: oklch(0.99 0.006 230); font-family: 'Inclusive Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-genre-art { aspect-ratio: 1; border-radius: 14px; background: var(--color-signal, oklch(0.86 0.19 122)); transition: transform 520ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-genre:hover .ds-genre-art { transform: scale(1.025); } .ds-genre span { display: block; margin-top: 24px; color: oklch(0.99 0.006 230); font-size: 0.86rem; } .ds-genre h3 { margin: 4px 0 0; font: 650 3rem/1.02 'Ojuju Variable', 'Arial Black', sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.025em; } .ds-genre p { margin: 12px 0 0; color: oklch(0.99 0.006 230); line-height: 1.65; }

narrative.overview: ClassVybes combines the confidence of a contemporary record sleeve with the clarity of a marked-up lecture note. Editorial scale, culturally specific imagery, flat surfaces, and plain-language safety make the experience energetic without weakening academic trust.
keyCharacteristics: Committed cobalt with rare chartreuse signals
Ojuju display typography with Inclusive Sans body copy
Original student photography and square genre artwork
Generous editorial spacing and asymmetric composition
Narrative motion with a complete reduced-motion path

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Chartreuse occupies less than ten percent of a screen and always means action, selection, or learning focus.

rules.name: The Two-Voices Rule
rules.body: Display type performs; body type explains.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Cards and controls do not combine visible borders with wide, soft shadows.

dos: Do make the source-to-track transformation the central product story.
Do use real student context and original genre art.
Do maintain visible focus, semantic structure, and reduced-motion support.
Do keep generated-output uncertainty and privacy policy visible.
donts: Don't use generic AI-tool marketing, purple glow, robot imagery, or floating dashboard cards.
Don't use template EdTech cards, childish primary colors, or stock classroom photography.
Don't use neon music-app cosplay, autoplay, or decorative waveform overload.
Don't invent metrics, testimonials, university logos, user counts, or compliance badges.
Don't use gradients, glassmorphism, oversized rounded-card grids, or emoji icons.
